title: OpenStax Anatomy and Physiology 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Anatomy and Physiology 2e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Anatomy and Physiology 2e introduces body organization, tissues, systems, homeostasis, movement, circulation, respiration, digestion, immunity, and reproduction.
Use this source for health-science reading, vocabulary support, diagrams, and chapter-level background before focused excerpts.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
